reviews.review_description:
I am not really into pinball, but this app really makes you move and have fun. :) Love the concept that you are part of the table and you can "win" mini games, too. And it can double as a party game.
Would buy more scenes if they were available. ;)
Anyway, great idea, good game, good work done, thank you for it!

Pinball but you’re in the machine, but Bounce Arcade has some additional control features.
Endless replayability, arcade style fun.
This is a really fun game containing 4 levels, it’s a shame the devs seem to have abandoned it as there is a lot of potential here.
What a great game very addictive..got it while it was at 99p so a bargain. This is a must buy game you will not be disappointed. Think there are 5 different games to play. 10/10
I would like to see some additional levels,
I totally love this game. It is one of my favourites. It’s just like being inside the machine. If they created add ons of different scenarios I would definitely buy them.

This App is a lot of fun to play! Nothing complicated, just plain fun and a little addictive 😉. Something you will definitely enjoy. Don't expect anything too challenging but there is enough variation to keep things interesting.

I tried the free trial and was really entertained!  The game is on sale this morning so I decided to buy it. Hopefully they can get some more variety soon. 
I would recommend this game at least try the free trial I don't think you'll be disappointed.

Can we get more or cake machines game is fun engaging just need more arcade machines too short not that many keep you going but we need more arcade machines keep up the good work it's pretty good for what it is just me more arcade machines or more pinball machine it's fun being the puncher in the pinball machine you just need more  just need more machine if you can add characters in there that would be cool that make the game more alive
Best dollar ever spent! Get this while it’s on sale! Yes there’s only a few tables but they are fun! This is a time killer type of game!
Super Flipper

Not even a year into launch and the game seems to have been abandoned... Not surprising considering the studios history. 

No new levels, no patches launched in nine months, and the developers realized they had to cut the price on this experiment very quickly. It's obvious this was never going to last. 

That being said, some of the tables are okay with decent mini games. Buying this on sale is worth it for a spout of boredom once in a while, and the only reason it gets 2 stars
Controls work flawlessly! Innovative take on pinball style gameplay!

I love a bit of pinball but these VR pinball games are great fun. I own one on PCVR as well brilliant and addictive. I love the leader boards as well. Great way to pass a hour or two when you are bored. Oh picked it up for £2 as well. Right bargain.
I love pinball, so this makes it feel like you warp into th machine and have to play as the  flippers.  Such a cool way to play.  This only works in VR.  Great job, and please add more tables 😀 👍

I'm not a huge Pinball player but decided to try the 30min free trial. Trial ended, immediately purchased and killed 2hrs 😆 awesome game! Highly recommend atleast trying the free trial, you won't regret it!
Took advantage of the summer mega sale and downloaded Bounce Arcade. What a blast! I’m still learning the ropes, but I’m having so much fun playing this…and it’s great exercise’

This game is great but you'll need to play more than just a couple of minutes to feel the greatness. 
The first few minutes I was like "hmm it's ok" but once you find out all the tricks, it's a lot of fun.
I suggest playing this with the "Quest Game Optimizer" to get a  MASSIVE boost in resolution. Once you did that, you can't play without anymore, as it looks rather blurry in comparison.

I wanted to love this game, but it feels so underwhelming. It’s as though this game has been released even though it’s only halfway through development.

The concept of this game is really cool, but I just felt like “Is this it?” The interaction with the 4 maps are boring and not a lot happens other than points go up and the occasional effect. I wish I could refund.
The gam is kinda fun. As mentioned by others, the ball is way too slow. The maps are fun but can become boring after a while. I bought it for 4€ and I think that's the right price.

I read the reviews and was stoked So i bought it . It's ok great concept if they had better graphics more elaborate levels would be better and add replay value 
I got bored Quick 
Someone will copy cat this game with great graphics and more stuff and levels 
It's ok I over payed 

But it's alright game I don't regent buying hope the development crew adds graphic updates on the future

My advice buy it on sale

I don't usually leave reviews but felt I had to for this cracker of a game. I love pinball and this takes it to a whole new level. The Tron-like neon graphics are fantastic and the controls are easy to understand but mastering those tables will take some work. Each table goes up in difficulty but it's so much fun trying to best your last high score. There are also mini games to play that are triggered by hitting certain things in the game. I have spent many hours having a blast with this game. Just buy it, you won't be disappointed. And thanks to the game developers. Any new tables on the horizon guys? I certainly hope so. I would gladly pay for some dlc to expand on what is already a brilliant fun game.

ORIGINAL REVIEW: I went into this not knowing what to expect other than watching the trailer. This is ridiculously fun. Only played the Wild West table so far and 45 mins flew by. Going after all the goals is too much fun. I wish the tables were a tad larger and better graphics, but neither of those criticisms take away from the fun value. I realllllllllly hope there’s dlc tables in the near future. Take my money!
I agree with the 4 star reviewer’s criticisms… feels like quest 1 graphics but it’s not a big deal. Difficulty settings would also be a welcome feature… at least a hard mode where the ball goes twice the speed maybe.

Dev question: Do you plan on releasing dlc tables? The game is great but it gets old playing the same 4 tables.    Needs a bit more variety to be long lasting


UPDATE 3/5/25
I’ve taken 2 stars off my original 5 star score because there’s been ZERO updates in 3 months. No bug fixes, no dlc tables, and most importantly, cuz the devs NEVER respond to anyone’s comments and/or questions.   
This game could have been really special if it wasn’t abandoned immediately after release. Could have been comparable to walkabout minigolf if they released new dlc tables every month. As it is now, I’d say don’t purchase this game. 4 tables isn’t enough, esp since 2 of em are pretty meh.  If devs release a new update and show they haven’t abandoned it, I’ll change my review back to 5 stars
I never got past the opening stage, which consisted of awful graphics and non sensical instructions.  Complete waste of money for me, anyway.

..aber es fehlt etwas an Action.
So ein Spiel zieht sich gerne mal über eine Stunde hin. Das ist zu lange für dauerhaften Spielspaß.

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Bounce Arcade is a fantastic VR experience that has completely exceeded my expectations! From the moment I put on my headset, I was immersed in a vibrant, energetic world that truly brings arcade-style gaming to life.

The controls are intuitive, the physics feel spot-on, and the gameplay strikes the perfect balance between fun and challenging. 
Visually, it’s a feast for the eyes with its bright colors and smooth animations, it’s an absolute blast every time.

I initially gave this game 5 stars, but the more I play, the more problems that need immediate attention.
There are far too many instances where the ball goes straight through the paddle despite you holding it right in front of it.  This is a MAJOR FAIL that needs to be fixed right away.
Multi-ball is poorly executed, with at least one ball getting behind you in the first seconds of the start of multi-ball.  Any ball immediately lost must be returned.
During the side games involving shooting, if you simultaneously depress the triggers on both controllers, only one seems to fire accurately.
For those of us playing in smaller, more confined spaces, the massive size of the lost ball area behind us hinders play and leads to far too many balls we're unable to hit because we can't move that far.  The size of this area needs to be decreased based on how much room we have to move.  This needs to be fixed!
Until these issues are addressed, this is 2 stars at best.

developer_response.body: Thank you for taking the time to leave such a thoughtful review! We apologize for the fact that you encountered so many issues and have absolutely forwarded your concerns to our dev team to investigate. We recently released a patch that resets lost body tracking automatically and are continuing to support the game through continued patches and QA. Feedback like yours helps us create the best possible experience. We hope you give the game another try at some point in the future!

reviews.review_description:
Combining visual and gameplay elements from pinball, soccer, and even a bit of TRON, Bounce Arcade manages to breathe new life into the pinball genre with some outstanding controls and some brilliantly designed tables.  There are only four tables to start, but these are large, complicated tables, each with a specific theme and plenty of objectives and missions to complete. 

If you love pinball, flashy TRON-like graphics, or just want to be a goalkeeper in some futuristic soccer match, Bounce Arcade is the game for you, and I cannot recommend it highly enough.

Full review over at Game Chronicles

developer_response.body: Thank you for taking the time to not only play Bounce Arcade but also to craft such a comprehensive review both here and on your website! It was definitely worth a read! (And we’re glad you liked the Safe mini-game, that one’s a challenging one!)

reviews.review_description: This game captures ALL the feels you get from pinball machines, and then CRANKS it up to the next-level! If you like anything “arcade” style, this game is for you. Innovative and energetic, but most importantly it’s just Fun-Fun-Fun 👍 I like that you can play chill-style while seated, or turn it into a workout while standing. Kudos to the Devs for embracing VR with this classic game. Mission accomplished!

developer_response.body: We’re so glad you highlighted the ability to play seated! It was important to us to deliver a game that was accessible to people looking for any level of physical activity!

reviews.review_description: Easy to get lost in!

Wowwww this game is Sooooooo Fun. You'll Dive into the vibrant world of Bounce Arcade, where cutting-edge graphics and addictive gameplay collide to create a truly immersive gaming experience. Get ready for heart-pounding challenges and exhilarating moments that will keep you on the edge of your seat!"
Bounce Arcade redefines the boundaries of mobile gaming with its stunning visuals and captivating gameplay.  This isn't just a game; it's an adrenaline-fueled adventure that will leave you wanting more. Experience the thrill of arcade action like never before in Bounce Arcade.  With its mesmerizing graphics and innovative gameplay, this game is a must-have for anyone seeking an immersive and unforgettable gaming experience."

developer_response.body: Wow! “it’s an adrenaline-fueled adventure that will leave you wanting more.” Is an incredible description! Thank you!

reviews.review_description: I got this after enjoying racket pinball so much,they're similar but different enough from each other..Fun game ..you could lose time easy in this 1. ..1 more go type of game..

reviews.review_title: The game screams for more tables.
reviews.review_description: At the time of writing this I'm holding number 1 on pirates and mansion. I really like all of the tables, the vivid and TRON-ish style is really giving that arcade feeling. The sounds are awesome like an actual pinball machine. The "difficulty" probably is the smallest negativity I can write on harder tables you really have to struggle to get the diamond trophy.

This game is awesome!  An original concept perfect for VR that’s so much fun.  I hope the developers keep adding new levels because this has Beat Saber potential.  Easy to pick up and play and a blast to keep playing.

developer_response.body: Thank you for such a legendary comparison!

reviews.review_title: Ton of fun and great workout
reviews.review_description: Could use some new levels, but i really enjoyed this one!
The perspective and how the ball returns to the player is confusing at first. Once you get used to that the rest of the game is super fun to play with all of the included mini games.

reviews.review_title: Probably my favorite game on Quest
reviews.review_description: This game is a masterpiece. Perfect non-stop fun for any fans of arcade-style games or pinball. All four tables are a blast. Worth every penny!
Love it
Great take in VR on Pinball.  Courses are interesting and play well.

reviews.review_title: First review because I love this game!
reviews.review_description: Just tried this and I LOVE IT! It’s like I’m inside the pinball machine. It’s immersive and engaging and oh so much fun! Very unique concept that keeps me coming back for more. 10/10!
